creator: jsm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 201469
add line for /usr/local/bin/VBoxClient --vmsvga-x11

Do not know if /usr/local/bin/VBoxClient --vmsvga-x11 is supported, but it has the wrong prefix in /usr/local/bin/VboxClient-all. The patch against the patch fixes that. (It gives an error message /usr/bin/VBoxClient: Not Found)
